project_privacy_data_flows.data_type: Device Sensor Data (Motion, Activity, Battery, Connectivity, Barometer, Pedometer)
project_privacy_data_flows.description: SensorContainer periodically collects all sensor data and sends to HA server. Includes motion activity, pedometer, battery, connectivity (SSID/BSSID/cellular), barometer, and app state sensors.

flow_steps.details: All sensor providers triggered by periodic update, signaled update, or registration.
CMMotionActivityManager queried for activity type (stationary, walking, running, automotive, cycling) and confidence level.

flow_steps.code: private func latestPedometerData() -> Promise<CMPedometerData> { Current.pedometer.queryStartEndHandler(start, end) { data, error in ... } }
flow_steps.details: CMPedometer reads steps, distance, floors ascended/descended, average pace, current pace, and cadence since start of day.

flow_steps.code: public func sensors() -> Promise<[WebhookSensor]> { signaler.latestPressureKpa ?? signaler.oneShotReading() }
flow_steps.details: CMAltimeter reads barometric pressure in kPa, converted to hPa for HA pressure sensor.

flow_steps.code: public func sensors() -> Promise<[WebhookSensor]> { Current.device.batteries().flatMap { Self.sensors(battery: $0) } }
flow_steps.details: Battery level (%) and state (charging/unplugged/full) for all device batteries.

flow_steps.code: private func ssid() -> Promise<[WebhookSensor]> { networkState.ssid; networkState.bssid }
flow_steps.details: WiFi SSID and BSSID collected from current network. Requires com.apple.developer.networking.wifi-info entitlement.
Connection type (WiFi/cellular/ethernet) and cellular technology (LTE/5G/NR) collected.
Cellular carrier info from CoreTelephony: carrier name, MCC, MNC, ISO country code, allows VoIP.
Reports whether app is currently in foreground (active) or background.
Reports frontmost app name (macOS Catalyst only).
Reports timestamp of last sensor update.
Reports app version and build number.
All sensor data sent to HA server via webhook (update_sensor_states).
